commitResults.messageTitle: feat: add date tagging to expenses with optional date/ parameter
commitResults.messageBody:
Expenses now have a LocalDate field. If date/ is omitted in the add
command, defaults to today's date. List output shows a date column.
Updated all tests to use the new 4-argument Expense constructor.

Fixes #37

commitResults.messageTitle: feat: implement category spending summary command
commitResults.messageBody:
Add summary command that groups expenses by category, shows totals
and percentages sorted highest to lowest.

Fixes #38

commitResults.messageTitle: feat: add command aliases for common commands
commitResults.messageBody:
Single-letter shortcuts: a=add, d=delete, l=list, s=summary,
b=budget, h=help. Resolved via alias map in Parser before the
main command switch. Help output updated to show aliases.

Fixes #39

- ParserAliasTest: all 6 aliases resolve correctly, full commands still work

commitResults.messageTitle: feat: enhance date parsing, summary output, and category normalization (#85)
commitResults.messageBody:
Accept DD-MM-YYYY, 'today', 'yesterday' for dates. Show txn count,
avg, and max in summary. Auto-capitalize categories. Extract DateParser
class for SRP compliance.

commitResults.messageTitle: test: add edge case tests for date parsing, summary sorting, and aliases
commitResults.messageBody:
Add 10 tests covering previously untested edge cases:
- DateParser: empty string, leap year, non-leap year adjustment, month-end
- Parser: add flags in different order, date flag first
- SummaryCommand: descending sort order, percentage output
- Aliases: uppercase alias and full command resolution

commitResults.messageBody:
Resolve conflicts in build.gradle (use jvmArgs -ea) and
ExpenseList.java (keep Level.FINE logging, fix duplicate logger).

Add tests that call TotalCommand.execute() directly to cover the
command class itself. Includes tests for multiple expenses, empty
list, single expense, and verifying execute does not modify the list.

commitResults.messageTitle: feat: add budget alert when approaching or exceeding budget
commitResults.messageBody:
After each add command, BudgetChecker checks total spending against
the monthly budget. Shows WARNING at 90%+ usage and ALERT when
exceeded. No message if no budget is set or spending is under 90%.

commitResults.messageTitle: feat: implement clear all expenses with confirmation
commitResults.messageBody:
Adds clear command that prompts user for yes/no confirmation before
removing all expenses. Empty list shows a message without prompting.
Any input other than yes (case-insensitive) cancels the operation.

commitResults.messageTitle: feat: implement single-level undo for mutating commands
commitResults.messageBody:
UndoManager saves a deep copy of the expense list before each mutating
command (add, delete, edit). Undo restores the snapshot. Two consecutive
undos show 'Nothing to undo' on the second attempt.

commitResults.messageTitle: feat: implement export expenses to CSV
commitResults.messageBody:
Adds export csv command that writes all expenses to
data/spendtrack_export.csv with proper CSV formatting.
Descriptions with commas are quoted, double quotes are escaped.

Adds goal command to set a savings target (goal g/AMOUNT) and view
progress (goal status). Shows percentage saved, or over-by amount
if spending exceeds goal. Goal is persisted via Storage.
